text:
A couple of plumbing updates this week. 🛠️

First, we rerouted Pruna models through Replicate. The connection is much more reliable now, and you get explicit resolution control instead of just hoping for the best.

Second, Wan-Pro image-to-video was throwing 500 errors. We tracked down the bug, fed the logs to the void, and the video pipeline is back online and humming. 📼✨

Go build something weird: pollinations.ai

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #aivideo #webdev #retroaesthetic #cozyvibes
